---
title: "Countess Kate. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Countess Kate. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1862
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London. Masters and Co., 78, New Bond Street, London.

### Notes

The heroine also appears in <i>The Pillars of the House.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
